title: Astraeus' Mercy
description: A mod that wil save you when dying more then once from a death source
body:
This is a very simple mod that protects players against perpetual death loops from specific damage sources. 
When someone dies x number of times in quick succession, they are teleported back to the world spawn of a safe dimension just before death.

This is useful in combination with other mods like WarpDrive where, If you die in space, you will respawn back in space which is a death sentence, because you won't have any breathing equipment.

By default this mod is configured to send you to the overworld spawn (not your bed) just as you are about to die for the third consecutive time to asphyxiation with less then 2 minutes between deaths, preventing you from getting stuck in space.
